fields.label: Event
fields.description: The gathering/event id this attendance row belongs to (Flock Gathering). Held as a raw string ref until the Gathering DocType lands; columns pinned to reporting.py §4.1. Both the manual-roster path and the engagement close path populate this with the gathering id (the engagement projection sets event=participation.gathering, FLO-11 §5). The proper FK lives in the `gathering` column below.

fields.label: Attendee
fields.description: Member or visitor reference. UNIQUE per (event, attendee_ref) — the idempotency backstop (FLO-10 §4.1). The engagement close path populates this with member_id (members) or attendee_key (visitors).

fields.label: Branch
fields.description: Primary row-level permission anchor — scoped natively by Frappe User Permissions on Flock Branch (ADR §6.2).

fields.label: Source
fields.description: Reporting source: bulk, engagement, game, questionnaire.

fields.label: Client Request Id
fields.description: Per-item idempotency key. The UNIQUE (event, attendee_ref, client_req_id) index is materialized by the v0_1 patch (FLO-10 §4.1). The engagement path stores attendee_key here.

fields.label: Engagement Session
fields.description: Source engagement session when source=engagement (FLO-9 §5). Null for manual-roster rows.

fields.label: Gathering
fields.description: The underlying Flock Gathering (denormalized for queries, ADR §3). Replaces the rev-1 event field as a proper FK.

fields.label: Member
fields.description: The person FK (ADR §9 dedup key). Visitors upsert as Flock Member status=Visitor.

fields.label: Group
fields.description: Group-tree scoping axis (ADR §3). Nullable for branch/org-level sessions.

fields.label: Attendee Display Name
fields.description: Display name resolved at capture time (FLO-9 §5).

fields.label: Attendee Key
fields.description: sha256(session | member | device_fp) idempotency key (FLO-9 §5). UNIQUE per (engagement_session, attendee_key).

fields.label: Engagement Kind
fields.options:
quiz_race
tap_burst
reaction
bingo
team_challenge
poll
word_cloud
qa
pulse

fields.label: Score
fields.description: Normalized 0–100 per kind (null for pure questionnaires). Persist-but-bounded — never surfaced per-member to other members (FLO-9 §14.2).

fields.label: Geo Region
fields.description: Opt-in coarse region only (privacy). Off by default (FLO-9 §14.4).
